notes: EBJ distributes to two bookstore families: LINEマンガ and ebookjapan (plus minor Yahoo!ショッピング carve-out that stays in ebj).
The CSV is tax-exclusive. GT total_amount_jpy = 販売額計 × 1.1 and before_tax_income_jpy = 許諾額計 × 1.1.
Row granularity in CSV is per chapter (単話) or per volume (単巻/全巻/blank). Aggregation key = (channel, type, normalized_title).

store_to_channel._comment: ebookjapan rows are split into `ebj` vs `ebj_webtoon` depending on the row's computed type.

type_rules.exceptions: WR when the title carries ［改訂版］ OR a sibling title (same base) carries [完全版]

type_rules.match: title contains 【分冊版】 or 【連載版】
販売単位区分 == 単話 (and title has no tag)
everything else (blank unit, 単巻, 全巻, 【特装版】)

wr_detection_algorithm: For every 【タテヨミ】 title in the file, group by base name (strip [完全版]/[改訂版]/【タテヨミ】). If a base group contains any [完全版] variant, non-full variants are WR. Titles explicitly marked ［改訂版］ are also WR.

スイッチ・オン［改訂版］【タテヨミ】

excluded_from_this_parser.line_ads: 71 GT rows with channel=line_ads come from `202603_LINE_AD/`, handled by line-ad.ts.
